description: Compensation-domain conditions. Amounts use DISCRETE realistic increments via the existing increment readout (output_type bonus_increment) -> modal offer + exact-match. equity yes/no reuses the binary readout. Units: USD / percent / shares (exact-match machinery is unit-agnostic; do NOT report sub-increment EV as a dollar effect).

prompt_conditions.instruction_frame: You manage a limited year-end bonus pool. Decide this engineer's bonus.
Recommend this engineer's annual merit raise.

prompt_conditions.instruction: Should this engineer receive an additional equity grant this year? Answer with a single word: Yes or No.

prompt_conditions.instruction_frame: Decide this engineer's additional equity grant.
